text.title: Google Ads Keyword Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: PMax managed via themes + audience signals, not keywords
brand exact suffices; full strategy overhead exceeds value
tag intent before structuring ad groups

branch.when: campaign_type == 'search' AND keywords_tagged_by_intent == true AND match_type == 'broad_only'

conclusion.verdict: add phrase + exact + tight negatives; sunset pure broad

branch.when: campaign_type == 'search' AND keywords_tagged_by_intent == true AND match_type == 'stacked' AND str_review_cadence == 'absent'

conclusion.verdict: wire weekly STR review with named owner before launch

example.trace: campaign_type == 'search' AND keywords_tagged_by_intent == true AND match_type == 'stacked' AND str_review_cadence == 'absent' → conclusion ref="str-mining-weekly" verdict="wire weekly STR review with named owner before launch"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
